overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit underpasses, towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, and a massive holographic bird. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with cinematic quality and vibrant neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with chromatic LED installation

events.description: LED wall shifts from green to blue lighting
LED wall shifts to pink and magenta tones
LED wall shifts to warm orange and yellow hues

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered underpass alongside the color-changing LED wall

entered.detail: tall wall with color-changing LED panels cycling through green, blue, pink, and orange
weathered concrete dividers separating the sidewalk from the road
concrete ceiling of the underpass with linear fluorescent lights
wet multi-lane road reflecting the neon lights
dark tunnel opening at the end of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered concrete underpass with a prominent chromatic LED wall on the left that cycles through vibrant colors. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk, passing concrete barriers on the right, with the wet asphalt road visible beyond. The enclosed space creates an immersive neon environment with no visible sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition plaza with holographic building advertisements

events.description: exiting the covered underpass into the open urban plaza with massive digital billboards
camera tilts upward to view the towering skyscrapers and holographic displays

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass and looking up at the massive holographic advertisements on surrounding skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall building covered in massive holographic advertisements including 'DREAM' text
skyscraper with illuminated 'MILITECH' signage near the top
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the street

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the underpass into a semi-open plaza, revealing towering skyscrapers adorned with massive holographic advertisements. The MILITECH building dominates the center view while the camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the futuristic architecture. The transition from enclosed neon space to the open cityscape marks a significant shift in spatial layout.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane intersection with holographic wildlife display

events.description: crossing the wet street from the sidewalk to the opposite side
large blue holographic bird materializes and flies overhead

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street while looking up at the overpass structures and surrounding towers

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with glowing red taillights driving down the street

entered.detail: large blue glowing holographic bird with extended wings flying through the air

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wet asphalt road, revealing the open intersection beneath massive overpass structures. A futuristic vehicle passes in the distance as a spectacular blue holographic bird materializes and soars overhead. The MILITECH tower remains visible to the left while the camera moves toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with vertical digital billboards and transit shelter

events.description: moving from open intersection to covered sidewalk corridor with large advertisements
passing the illuminated transit shelter with yellow interior lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past glowing vertical advertisements and a futuristic bus shelter

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screens displaying various advertisements and neon graphics
futuristic bus stop with glowing yellow interior lights and glass panels
rectangular concrete blocks lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial sidewalk, the camera passes towering vertical digital billboards on the right displaying vibrant neon advertisements. A futuristic transit shelter with warm yellow lighting appears on the left. The holographic bird fades from view as the camera moves deeper into the corridor of digital signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with overhead walkways and digital signage

events.description: futuristic vehicle with glowing elements passes by on the left side of the street
slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the wet sidewalk surrounded by towering buildings with bright neon advertisements and overhead walkways

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with glowing undercarriage driving past on the street

entered.detail: tall building with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows
various illuminated signs and advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the neon-lit sidewalk, passing under overhead walkways connecting the skyscrapers. A futuristic vehicle glides past on the wet street to the left. The camera moves past various commercial buildings adorned with bright signage, maintaining the immersive cyberpunk atmosphere of the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit underpass into a sprawling, open-air cyberpunk metropolis. It begins within a covered concrete passage, gliding past a chromatic LED wall and wet asphalt before exiting into a semi-open plaza where the view expands upward toward towering skyscrapers and massive holographic advertisements. As the camera crosses the intersection beneath heavy overpass structures, a spectacular blue holographic bird materializes and soars overhead, shifting the focus from the architecture to the open sky. The scene then transitions onto a commercial sidewalk, passing vertical digital billboards and a warm yellow transit shelter as the holographic bird fades into the distance. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the urban corridor, gliding under overhead walkways and past bright commercial signage while futuristic vehicles pass on the rain-slicked street.
